description: Gold set for retrieve-then-rerank IR evaluation. Queries are in Indonesian (cross-lingual), the corpus (churn_papers) is in English. Relevance is KEYWORD-GROUNDED weak supervision: a retrieved chunk is judged relevant if its text contains ANY phrase in 'must_contain' (case-insensitive). This is reproducible but is a PROXY for human relevance judgments — for a thesis/publication these labels should be spot-checked manually. Matching mode is 'any'.
